metadata.title: Meezan Payroll Partner | Payroll Accounts | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bank is pleased to introduce Meezan Payroll Partner – a complete payroll management solution that offers benefits such as payroll disbursement, pension disbursal, staff reimbursement, bonus processing and much more.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Corporate Banking Cash Management Bank Accounts Term Deposits Treasury Corporate Payroll Card Meezan Payroll Partner If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Meezan Payroll Partner An Exclusive Digital Employee Banking Solution Meezan Bank is pleased to introduce Meezan Payroll Partner - a complete payroll management solution that offers benefits such as payroll disbursement, pension disbursal, staff reimbursement, bonus processing and much more. The entire product suite is powered via eBiz+, an online platform for Corporate Collections and Payments. Meezan Payroll Partner provides a one-stop banking solution for clients as they can get their daily banking and payroll needs all in one place. Key Features Shariah-compliant product offering Mudarabah-based savings accounts Digital account opening Cost effective - eliminates overhead costs for the company Minimum documentation requirement Premium Banking* Access to Consumer Banking products at preferential rates Ease in documentation for consumer products *Subject to meeting the minimum salary criteria. Access to Account Details via eBiz+ Our Information Reporting platform provides real-time access to transactional information and account balances. In addition, customers can also create customized MIS and access their Account Statements in multiple formats from their computer. Benefits for Employers Door step services offering for employees Hassle-free and swift account opening Dashboard for visibility of Account Opening Status Quick digital transfer of salaries to employee accounts Avoidance of risks linked to cash handling and distribution Benefits for Employees A complete employee banking solution On-premises facilitation eliminating the need to visit branch A salary account with no minimum balance requirement Additional benefits include: Free debit card Free cheque book Free SMS alerts Free pay order Free internet banking Free mobile app Free e-statement Discounted rates on consumer products For further details and queries, engage with our Meezan Payroll Partner specialist at payrollpartner@meezanbank.com or visit your nearest branch. How the Meezan Payroll Partner Account Works Download Fatwa On agreeing to become a Payroll Partner Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Meezan Payroll Partner Monthly 0.01 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Payroll Partner Monthly 0.13% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Terms & Conditions EFU General Insurance - Window Takaful Operations 'Takaful Coverage' for Meezan Payroll Partner (MPP) Mudarabah Based Current Account holders. This arrangement is designed to provide financial security and comprehensive coverage for risks such as cash withdrawal transactions, loss of mobile phone, identification documents, financial benefit resulting in accidental death or permanent disability and utility bill and grocery bill benefits up to 2 months. Key Features Shariah compliant Takaful Coverage No minimum balance required Terms & Conditions Benefit Per Covered Instance Sum Takaful Cash Withdrawal (ATM/OTC) PKR 50,000/- (Twice in a year) Identification Documents PKR 5,000/- Mobile Phone PKR 40,000/- Accidental Death or Permanent Disability Continuation Benefit PKR 900,000/- (PKR 75,000/- for 12 Months) Grocery Bill Continuation Benefit PKR 50,000/- (PKR 25,000/- for 2 months) Utility for 2 months) For further details, please refer to the attached Terms & Conditions Shariah-Compliant Consumer Ease Financing Meezan Payroll Partner Discover Meezan Payroll Partner Consumer Ease Financing - your gateway to Shariah-compliant financing for essential goods such as air conditioners, refrigerators, generators, and more. Experience hassle-free financing with Partner Consumer Ease - where excellence meets innovation. Learn More MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
